name: Roadside Bandit Ambush
description: A fallen oak blocks the King's Road, and the silence that follows is too perfect. Figures rise from the ditches on either side — masked men with cudgels and short bows, arranged with the practised ease of those who have robbed this stretch before.
failureConsequence: The bandits bind your hands and take everything of value before vanishing into the bracken. A passing carter frees you an hour later, but your supplies are gone.
